title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JobPilot is a full-stack AI job application platform that demonstrates how to build production systems around AI agents using nine context files and five open-source agent skills. The tutorial covers the workflow and architecture for preventing agent drift while shipping real projects with AI in 2026.
